content: We introduce Bourgain’s projection theorem, a central result in the field. It is the analogue of the Bourgain-Katz-Tao projection theorem over the real numbers.
title: Lecture 14: The Bourgain Projection Theorem Part 1 (over the Real Numbers)

video_metadata.video_tags: Bourgain projection theorem, projection theory, multiscale, Furstenberg
video_metadata.youtube_description:
MIT 18.156 Projection Theory, Spring 2025
Instructor: Pablo Shmerkin

We introduce Bourgain's projection theorem, a central result in the field. It is the analogue of the Bourgain-Katz-Tao projection theorem over the real numbers.
